SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Audience
Minimal recipient abstraction for platform-agnostic messaging.
AudienceResolver
Normalizes "any sender-like object" into an Audience.
ConfigFormatProvider
Optional platform hook for default config formats.
ConfigNamespaceProvider
Optional platform hook for namespaced config storage.
ListenerSubscription
Handle for unregistering a previously subscribed listener.
ManagedExecutor
A thin AutoCloseable wrapper around an ExecutorService.
ManagedScheduler
A thin AutoCloseable wrapper around a ScheduledExecutorService.
MsgFmt
Single placeholder substitution engine for the whole library.
Platform
Abstraction over runtime platform (Bukkit, Fabric, NeoForge, etc.).
PlatformLogger
Platform-friendly logger facade to avoid binding to a specific implementation.
PlayerLifecycle
Normalized player join/leave event emitted by the platform layer.
PlayerLifecycleListener
Listener for normalized player join/leave events.
PlayerLifecycleType
Normalized player lifecycle transition observed by the platform layer.
PlayerLocale
Normalized player locale update emitted by the platform layer.
PlayerLocaleListener
Listener for normalized player locale updates.
PlayerMessage
Normalized player-originated message emitted by the platform layer.
PlayerMessageListener
Listener for normalized player-originated messages.
PlayerMessageType
Player-originated message source type.
ShutdownHookRegistrar
Optional platform hook for lifecycle shutdown events.
Tasks
Convenience helpers for scheduling tasks with Platform.
TaskScheduler
Provides executors for CPU-bound and IO-bound tasks.
TaskSchedulers
Factory utilities for TaskScheduler.
ThreadContext
Describes the current execution context for platform thread checks.
